import requests
import json

def listen_sse(url: str):
    """
    Belirtilen URL'den Server-Sent Events (SSE) dinler ve gelen veriyi yazdırır.
    """
    try:
        with requests.get(url, stream=True, timeout=None) as response:
            response.raise_for_status()  # HTTP hatalarını kontrol et

            for line in response.iter_lines():
                if line:  # Boş satırları atla
                    decoded_line = line.decode('utf-8')
                    if decoded_line.startswith('data:'):
                        data = decoded_line[len('data:'):].strip()
                        # JSON verisi ise ayrıştırmayı deneyebiliriz
                        try:
                            json_data = json.loads(data)
                            print(f"Received JSON event: {json.dumps(json_data, indent=2)}")
                        except json.JSONDecodeError:
                            print(f"Received text event: {data}")
                    elif decoded_line.startswith('event:'):
                        event_type = decoded_line[len('event:'):].strip()
                        print(f"Event type: {event_type}")
                    elif decoded_line.startswith('id:'):
                        event_id = decoded_line[len('id:'):].strip()
                        print(f"Event ID: {event_id}")
                    elif decoded_line.startswith('retry:'):
                        retry_time = decoded_line[len('retry:'):].strip()
                        print(f"Retry time: {retry_time}")

    except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
        print(f"Error: Connection to {url} timed out.")
    except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError as e:
        print(f"Error: Could not connect to {url}. {e}")
    except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:
        print(f"An unexpected error occurred: {e}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    # Örnek kullanım: Gerçek bir SSE akışı sağlayan bir URL ile değiştirin.
    # Test için aşağıdaki URL'i kullanabilirsiniz, genelde rastgele veri üretir:
    # "https://stream.wikimedia.org/v2/stream/recentchange"
    # veya basit bir test sunucunuz varsa: "http://localhost:8000/events"

    # def sse_test():

    #         for i in range(5):
    #             yield f"data: Hello from server! Message {i}\n\n"
    #             time.sleep(1)
    #         yield "data: {\"type\": \"end\", \"message\": \"Stream finished\"}\n\n"
    #     return Response(generate(), mimetype='text/event-stream')
    # if __name__ == '__main__':
    #     app.run(port=8000)

    sse_url = "https://stream.wikimedia.org/v2/stream/recentchange"
    print(f"Listening for SSE from {sse_url}...")
    print("Press Ctrl+C to stop.")
    listen_sse(sse_url)
